title: loop-sdk .loop file
description: The normalized object form of a .loop file: front-matter `meta` plus the ordered `steps`. A .loop file on disk is YAML front-matter (--- ... ---) followed by markdown `## step-name` sections, each an action's YAML body; this schema describes what that parses into. Source of truth for editors, linters, and the loop-sdk validator.

steps.description: Ordered steps. Each step's output is referenceable downstream as {{step-name}}.

session.description: Informational — the session type the runner should expect (e.g. "browser").

browserMode.description: Browser flavor: 'isolated' (fresh Chrome, default) or 'chrome' (attach to your real Chrome over CDP).

cdpUrl.description: CDP endpoint for browserMode: chrome. Default: http://localhost:9222

browserProfile.description: Chrome profile for the run's browser (interpreted by the runner).

model.description: Default model for claudeCli / agent steps. For `agent` it's a registry "provider:model" spec, e.g. "claude-code:sonnet", "codex:gpt-5.2-codex", "anthropic:claude-opus-4-8".

mode.description: Enforcement posture. 'explore' (default): frictionless — worker steps skip permissions unless they declare their own `tools:`. 'strict': every worker step is scoped to an allowlist and unlisted tools are denied. When unset, auto-escalates to 'strict' for loops that ship hard-to-reverse changes (worktree, onSuccess: merge|pr).

tools.description: Default tool allowlist for claudeCli / verify steps (a step's own `tools:` overrides).

workdir.description: Default working directory for claudeCli / verify steps (a repo path makes them build workers).

worktree.description: Isolate this run's file changes in a git worktree. workdir must be inside a git repo; each run gets its own branch (loop/<name>-<id>).

onSuccess.description: What the runner does with the run's worktree branch after a SUCCESSFUL run: 'keep' (default), 'merge' back into the source branch, or 'pr' (push + open a pull request).

reflexion.description: When a verify step fails and the step before it is a prompt step, retry that step ONCE with the judge's critique appended, then verify again. Default: true.

vars.description: Declared input defaults for the loop (lose to any value the host passes in).

notify.description: Notification config applied to this loop and its sub-loops.

name.description: Unique, kebab-case (letters, digits, hyphens) so it's reachable via {{name}}.

action.description: A built-in action or any custom action registered in the actions map passed to loadLoop().

prompt.description: Prompt text (claudeCli / codexCli / agent / verify). Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

assert.description: Assertion for verify steps. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

model.description: Model override for this step. claudeCli/codexCli: the CLI --model name. agent: a registry "provider:model" spec.

system.description: System prompt for an `agent` step. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

screenshot.description: Attach a screenshot of the current browser state to the prompt.

maxSteps.description: Cap on agentic turns for this step (claude --max-turns).

workdir.description: Working directory override for this step's subprocess. Supports {{refs}}.

tools.description: Restrict this worker step to these tools (Claude Code names, e.g. Read, Bash, mcp__browser). Declaring an allowlist ENFORCES it regardless of mode.

url.description: URL for navigate steps. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

message.description: Message for log / send steps. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

to.description: iMessage recipient — your own phone number or Apple ID email.

key.description: Variable name (set-variable) or keyboard key to press (key).

selector.description: CSS selector to click. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

text.description: Element text to click, or text to type. Supports {{step-name}} interpolation.

deltaY.description: Vertical scroll amount in px (scroll). Default: 300.

loop.description: Path to another .loop file to run as a nested sub-loop (subloop / each).

vars.description: Extra vars to pass into the sub-loop context.

items.description: Items to iterate over (each): a {{step-name}} reference or a literal YAML array.

as.description: Variable name for the current item inside each iteration. Default: 'item'.

steps.description: Inline step definitions for parallel / each / subloop (an alternative to a `loop:` file).

output.description: Which child step's output to collect (each: per iteration; sub: as this step's output). Defaults to the last step.

continueOnError.description: If true, each continues past failed items instead of aborting.

concurrency.description: Run up to N items at once (1-8, default 1). Parallel items get isolated state.

retries.description: Retry this step up to N times on failure.

skipOnError.description: Skip this step instead of failing the loop.

expect.description: Deterministic output contract — a HARD gate checked in code after the step runs.

matches.description: Output must match this regular expression (JS syntax).

mcpSpec.description: MCP servers: a list of names resolved from ~/.loopdeloop/mcp.json, or inline server definitions.
